scenes.reason: Currency amount detected: "For example, if your service is ₦100,000, your client should be charged ₦107,500."
Short/monthly deadline detected: "That ₦7,500 is VAT and must be separated immediately and remitted on or before the 21st of the following month."
Risk/warning language detected: "And if you miss filing deadlines, penalties apply — starting from about ₦50,000, plus additional charges and interest depending on delay.”"
Risk/warning language detected: "“But the real risk is not just penalties."
Risk/warning language detected: "“But if your records are not properly classified, Rev360 can apply BOJ — Best of Judgment — and calculate VAT on total inflows at 7.5%."
